content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 26 focused on stabilizing the elizaOS agent framework and cloud infrastructure. Key achievements include multi-architecture support for ISO builds, significant improvements to the agent orchestrator's reliability, and critical fixes for cloud-agent boot sequences and desktop UX. The team also addressed CI/CD pipeline bottlenecks and refined prompt handling to ensure consistent agent behavior.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Agent Orchestration & Reliability**
*   Resolved sub-agent task duplication by absorbing cross-session `task_complete` events ([#7969](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7969)).
*   Increased ACP transport timeouts from 30s to 5 minutes to prevent premature termination of complex sub-agent tasks ([#7954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7954)).
*   Improved planner logic to handle tool-call hints correctly even when Stage 1 output is contradictory ([#7957](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7957)).
*   Redacted loopback URLs from sub-agent task reports to maintain clean user-facing output ([#7955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7955)).

**OS, Infrastructure & Cloud Deployment**
*   Enabled multi-arch ISO building (amd64, arm64, riscv64) and added smoke-test recipes for validation ([#7971](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7971), [#7977](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7977)).
*   Fixed cloud-agent boot failures by ensuring proper plugin loading and disabling TUI in server-only modes ([#7981](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7981), [#7995](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7995), [#8002](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8002)).
*   Hardened desktop first-run voice startup and fixed Windows FFI build issues ([#7994](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7994), [#7988](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7988)).
*   Added security response headers to the Cloud API Worker ([#7996](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7996)).

**Prompting & Core Utilities**
*   Added `parseToonKeyValue` utility for improved prompt parsing ([#7985](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7985)).
*   Strengthened phantom-action-claim rules and forbade reply text that leaks LLM training-cutoff metadata ([#7945](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7945), [#7965](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7965)).
*   Ensured the planner surfaces refusal text when required tools are unavailable ([#7951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7951)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8012](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8012) fix(plugin-sql): native cast for boolean→integer migrations.
*   [#8010](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8010) feat(plugin-gitpathologist): forensic git-history analysis.
*   [#8008](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8008) fix(core): expose actionStateProvider in every context.
*   [#8006](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8006) fix(core): drop unknown top-level planner args.
*   [#8005](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8005) fix(plugin-agent-orchestrator): forward GITHUB_TOKEN.
*   [#8004](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8004) fix(plugin-agent-orchestrator): runProvisionWorkspace honors params.
*   [#7998](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7998) [codex] remove dflash local inference runtime.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Orchestrator & Prompting Fixes**
*   Addressed sub-agent cascade issues where single prompts triggered multiple replies ([#7967](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7967)).
*   Fixed LLM training-cutoff metadata leakage in agent responses ([#7961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7961)).

**Planner Loop Logic**
*   Investigated and closed a loop issue where the planner failed to advance past the first successful tool call ([#8007](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8007)).

## NEW ISSUES

**CLI & Package Distribution**
*   Reported crashes during global installation of `elizaos` and `@elizaos/cli` due to path export and dependency interop issues ([#8000](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8000), [#8001](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8001)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *None.* (No issues currently have more than 3 comments).
